entry.title: Re: serial number maintenance
entry.content:
Hi @rsk_gsk   

The SAP Learning group helps you to develop the knowledge, grow your skills, and  future-proof your career. Here you can ask questions and collaborate with other learners to reach your learning goals and to prepare for your SAP Certification exams. 

It looks like your question is not related to learning materials we published on our SAP Learning platform and while the topic you addressed  isn't specifically covered here and since it can hardly be answered without in-depth implementation knowledge, I can point you to several excellent resources to help find an answer to your question. 

I would like to encourage you to post your  question to a our SAP Community where you can directly exchange with experienced experts with project Background -  SAP Community is a public space where anyone can start discussions and questions are answered by anyone. SAP Community enables professionals across the globe to connect, exchange information, engage, and receive recognition for your achievements. This inclusive and receptive environment welcomes all individuals who want to seek help and share knowledge about SAP software and solutions.

If you need help, and your issue is specific to the standard functionality of your SAP solution, contact SAP Product Support using the channel listed below which best suits your business impact

 If you need help, and your issue is specific to the standard functionality of your SAP solution, contact SAP Product Support using the channel listed on our our Get support site.

Please always feel free to come back to our SAP Learning group to ask your questions and collaborate with other learners to reach your learning goals and to prepare for your SAP Certification exams.

However, for your particular question, I'd recommend the resources above.

Therefore, I close this thread.


I hope this helps, and best of luck!

Margit

entry.title: Re: CAP annotation @Common.valuelistwithfixedvalues with...
entry.content:
Hi @abranjan ,

I could'nt find the solution through annotations, but via different route. 

You will have to cache the selected value from the drop down locally in the runtime  and use it as filter in the following manner.

srv.on('READ','Myentity',async req=>{
      

    if(req.query.SELECT !== undefined){
      const condtionLiteral =`DropDownFieldName='SelectedDropDownFieldValue'`

     //instantiate the cxn parser object
      const parser= cds.parse;
      // parse cxn : resultant =>   {xpr:[ {ref:['DropDownFieldName']}, '=', {val:'SelectedDropDownFieldValue'} ]}
      const cxnObject = parser.expr(condtionLiteral);
      const cxnArray = [...cxnObject.xpr];
      req.query.SELECT.where = cxnArray;
    }

    const data = await srv.run(req.query);
    return data 
})

Please also have a look at this documentation of CXN - CXN-Expression Notation  .Let me know if this works for you.

Thank you 

Regards

Subramaniyam N

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud User and Team Provisioning SCIM API Best Practices and Sample Scripts
entry.content:

Can you please let us know is there any API call which can be used for mass roles/teams assignmnets to users in SAC?

We need to assign more than 500 roles/teams to users in single API Call.

Regards,
Jagan

entry.title: Should can my career(5+ Years expereince) from Testing domain to SAP FICO?
entry.content:
I am working in a service-based MNC as a QA Consultant and have an overall 5+ years of experience in Software testing in the Finance domain. Currently, pursuing an MBA and I'm very good in account and finance along with consulting managing, and handling multiple stakeholders. 

I'm getting a log of suggestions to change my career to SAO FICO. I did some research and found out that I'm good at all the prerequisites that are needed for this. My only concern is that if I switch to this will there be a problem for me due to experience in Testing or how it will be? 

Please provide your suggestion If I do proper training and hands-on will I be able to get a better job? What will be your recommendation?

entry.title: Re: MIRO-compare Inovice and Oldest GR date of PO

I can select it, but it not works.

entry.title: Re: SAC story design exam(C_SACS_2321) expiring soon, wha...
entry.content:
Hi @Debar_23 
There will be a successor  C_SAC_2402: Data Analyst – SAP Analytics Cloud planned to be available in March 2024.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Concurrent employment in SF, long leave, and part time work hours
entry.content:
We have a requirement where the customer would like to enable to concurrent employment in SF.

At the same time an interesting topic came up as to how the concurrent employment be leveraged to support a particular situation, where the Employee is on parental leave, and the Employee in parallel works part time whilst being on parental leave (legal right).

There are 2 scenarios to consider: 
1. Employe can choose to come back after 1 year with limited employment (as a part time worker) 
2. Employee can choose to come back after the end of full leave.

Q: how to incorporate this in the concurrent employment in SF so that the above scenarios can be covered exhaustively.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Activities Log Command-line Interface (CLI) to Automate Downloads + Associat
entry.content:
This sample also works for Datasphere.

 

At some point, I will update this blog to mention that (currently waiting for a feature improvement, so when I update the article, all the links continue to work)

entry.title: Re: EML Modify Update of entity failed with no error message
entry.content: In my case the problem was in one of my determinations. There was an exception which was not catched and written in reported/failed. You can set a breakpoints at every determination and instance feature in your model and look in debugger what happends there.

entry.title: Re: Advance Script Slow Performance in SAC for Planning D...
entry.content: Hi Nikhil, I have tried enabling the planning area for the model in the model preferences and it does not improve performance. should we conclude that this issue due to tenant sizing or resource availabiltiy? @SAPSupport

entry.title: Re: Finding the right CDS Extractor in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello @FrankRiesner ,

Thanks for the reply, but I wanted to avoid modifying the extractor by copying, but I will consider it.


I have one more question, I hope I don't bother you too much, I identified a cds view for example: I_UTILITIESINVOICINGDOCUMENT, from the checks performed, it was developed to allow data extraction, but the annotation that enables data extraction is missing. The question is: how is it recommended to add this annotation, can the standard cds be modified directly in eclipse and then activated or is there another procedure to modify the standard cds to enable data extraction. (I tried to find an answer but I found information only for custom cds).

Thank you once again for your time.

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Re: EML Modify Update of entity failed with no error message
entry.content: Also check if the fields you are updating are not read only and if there is any precheck implemented.

entry.title: Why some values in program are automaticly increment?
entry.content:
Why some values in program are automaticly increment after starting 'At selection screen output' section.

I've got an programm, which is used in few transactions. 
In one of it values are changing after starting an 'At selection screen output'  section, and at second values are not changing.
There is no some additional inizialization, the code before 'At selection screen output is the same.

i try to find authorization object at su24, and one t-code has it, but there are no values that are aoutomaticly increments
in it.
what it can be if it not an authorization object, or mb values can initialize somwhere else( not in su24 ) ?

entry.title: Re: Exclude requirements calculations and planned orders...
entry.content:
Hello Caetano,

Thank you for your support.

The Badi's parameters seem to have no firmining indicator field for the planned orders.
I tried setting MDPS-VSTAT to 「N」, but the result was that PLAF was re-registered.
Could you please tell me which field the firmining indicator refers to?
Currently, we are calling the RMMPS000 program or T-code：MD40 to perform MPS processing.
We noticed that before calling badi MD_ADD_ELEMENTS, the existing plaf deletion data is retrieved and set in an internal table(※).
※CL_PPH_MDPSX_POSTPROCESSING⇒FINALIZE_MDPSX_CDS
→CL_PPH_MDPSX_POSTPROCESSING⇒SEPARATE_OLD_PROC_PROPOSALS.

Is it possible to edit the MRP ELEMENT (CH_COPY_MDPSX) using BADI MD_ADD_ELEMENTS and leave the existing PLAF intact and avoid deletion and re-registration?

Best regards,
Hannyi

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content: @RinkyKarthik Many thanks for the details, e.g. on what the Talent Intelligence Foundation (TIF) is and does. Did I understand it correctly, that only those skills which are already available in the customers attributes library would be provided as a personal recommendation by TIF? Or in other words: Even if the TIF discovers a skill as a possible attribute for a specific user, it would not recommend that skill as long as it is not already part of the company´s library. Again, many thanks for clarification.

entry.title: Re: cl_gui_alv_grid->set_table_for_first_display
entry.content: Did you try to call method LIST_PROCESSING_EVENTS from an AFTER_USER_COMMAND event handling method to trigger (again) the top_of_page event ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud User and Team Provisioning SCIM API Best Practices and Sample Scripts
entry.content:
Hello Jagan

Due to the recent change of platform, this blog is hosted on, I can't actually reply to you. All I can do is post another comment. It means it's difficult for us, and others, to follow a thread and see the context of our discussion. Other comments may be posted and it will be difficult to follow. It's also not easy to see if I need to reply to a comment, as all comments are without a thread.

So, can I ask, please instead post a question. (Since only 'questions' enable replies and keep the context of the question)

When you (or others) post a question, please feel free to post a comment back to this blog with a link to that new question and include the description of the question. It will help others find related content that way. 

(for your question, can you be a little more specific? For example, please describe what's wrong with the existing samples that can indeed do this task)

Many thanks, Matthew

entry.title: Re: SAP Marketing Cloud Release 2402 is Here!
entry.content:
Hi Bradley,

Glad to hear that the new subdivided child attributes help you with your use cases in SMC. And yes, the description texts (i.e. the label column) should be available for the newly defined attribute. Apparently, we have a gap here. We plan to cover this as soon as possible.

If you want you can create a customer ticket for this request. This might speed up the process.

Best regards,
Christof

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 3
entry.content:

...and the bonus part!

entry.title: Re: Memory leak? Memory from data references not being released
entry.content:
You can find explanation between "used" and "allocated" here:

649327 - Analysis of memory consumption - SAP for Me

I guess "allocated" is explained with this note.

But I wonder why the "used memory" doesn't revert back exactly to its starting point after FREE + garbage collection. In my 7.40 system, it jumps from 1MB to 380MB, then go back to 9MB after FREE + GC, I don't know why it doesn't go back to 1MB.

PS: please edit your question and format your code via the buttons "..." then "</>", e.g.:

REPORT.
* This structure generates leaks once data ref is created
types: begin of tys_data_leak,
            f1(10) type c,
            r_DATA type REF TO DATA, "type ref to BKPF shows the same issue
           END OF TYS_DATA_LEAK,
           tyt_data_leak type STANDARD TABLE OF tys_data_leak.

CLASS lcl_test DEFINITION.
* either with T_DATA as an attribute or as part of the class, same issue
* to check just set or remove r_data from the structure
* once r_data is referenced, there is no way of deallocating the memory
PUBLIC SECTION.

  DATA: t_data_leak TYPE tyt_data_leak.

  METHODS alloc_mem_leak.
  METHODS free_mem_leak.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_test IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD alloc_mem_leak.
    DATA: ls_data TYPE LINE OF tyt_data_leak.
    BREAK-POINT.
    DO 100000 TIMES.
      ls_data-f1 = 'AAAAAAAAAA'.
      CREATE DATA ls_data-r_data TYPE bkpf. "
      INSERT ls_data INTO TABLE t_data_leak.
    ENDDO.

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD free_mem_leak.

    BREAK-POINT.
*1 Try just freeing the table. nope
*2 Tried individually freeing all references. nope
*3 Tried Freeing the data with FS-->This does not work (and why should it?). nope
*4 Tried freeing the reference (in case of generic) and then replacing it with a new one to a smaller type .nope

*    LOOP AT t_data_leak ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_data>).
*      CLEAR <ls_data>-r_data.
*      FREE <ls_data>-r_data.
*    ENDLOOP.

    FREE t_data_leak.
    cl_abap_memory_utilities=>do_garbage_collection( ).
*    COMMIT WORK AND WAIT."<<unnecesary
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  DATA(test) = NEW lcl_test( ).
  test->alloc_mem_leak( ).
  test->free_mem_leak( ).
  FREE test.
  cl_abap_memory_utilities=>do_garbage_collection( ).
  ASSERT 1 = 1.

entry.title: Re: Thai Characters Font

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP BusinessObj...
entry.content:
Hello Aravindh S,

I agree with previous answer. 

SAP BusinessObjects is part of the legacy portfolio, therefore we are retiring the certification exam. I would recommend to go for an SAC certification as this is our strategic cloud analytics solution. In March, a new certification for data analysts with focus on SAC will become available. So, I'd recommend to wait for it. In the meantime, you can start marking yourself familiar with SAC learning materials on learning.sap.com.

Hope it helps!

BR, Inna

entry.title: Compare Date in IT0041 with a fixed date
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to compare date in IT0041 date type with a fixed date in UAE payroll PCR. If the date in IT0041 date type is on or after the fixed date goto a particular rule, else goto another rule.

I have maintained the fixed date in payroll constant KZGP01 with start date 31.10.2023 and enddate 31.12.9999 and value 1.

Challenge is the date in IT0041 date type RG is getting compared with the payroll period instead of fixed date. Can some one help me with this.

Refer attached screen shot of the output.

entry.title: Re: Document uploads with tcode IE02 missing in my DMS re...
entry.content:
Hi Chanchal, 

I saw your question and I assume that you are using GOS attachment list function for the upload in MIGO or ML81N. For this GOS attachment list option there is no SAP DMS document info record created as there is no standard object link type between DMS and MIGO for example. 

For VA02 or IE02 there are object type VBAP and EQUI that can be customizing for a DMS document type in transaction DC10. However for more information it would help a lot ot have some screenshots of the behavior. 

Br

Christoph

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2310 /MERP/BADI_WCM_SYNC_SSAM error
entry.content:
We have installed SMFND + SMERP SP 13 on ERP 6.0 EPH 7.
In t-code /O/IWFND/GW_CLIENT, when I call URI:

  • /sap/opu/odata/MERP/SAP_SRV_ASSET_MANAGER_2310/MyEquipments
  • or /sap/opu/odata/MERP/SAP_SRV_ASSET_MANAGER_2310/$metadata
  • or any other /sap/opu/odata/MERP/SAP_SRV_ASSET_MANAGER_2310/...

I get error 500 and DUMP is generated. I can check the dump in ST22:

The current ABAP program "/MFND/CL_CORE_BOM_OMDO_CONFIG=CP" had to be
terminated because it has come across a statement that unfortunately cannot be executed.
In include "/MERP/CL_PM_WCM_APPRPROCESS_ODCO ", in line 34 of program
"/MERP/CL_PM_WCM_APPRPROCESS_ODCP ", the following syntax errors
have occurred:
Type "BADI_WCM_SYNC_SSAM_SAP" is unknown.

SE19 - check:
BAdI: /MERP/BADI_WCM_SYNC_SSAM
Enhancement Implementation -> Check

Type "IF_EX_BADI_WCM_SYNC_SSAM" is unknown

Interface/Method is missing. I have implemented all notes from the primary note https://me.sap.com/notes/2660361.

entry.title: Re: EWM RF / Slipstream: Buttons in toolbar?
entry.content: Hello again! It seems this has been fixed with SP18, right?

entry.title: Re: EWM RF / Slipstream: Buttons in toolbar?
entry.content:
Hello again @kmagons !

It seems this has been fixed with SP18, right?

Description: "The semantic meaning of each button or menu item is considered when creating individual changes. Changes to buttons are interpreted based on the button meaning and applied even if the position of the button changes throughout the use of the application."

entry.title: Re: Capitalization Report
entry.content: That all depends on the path to Capitalization.  Using projects the costs flow through the project and are then capitalized (or expensed or both).  So there isn't a direct link from the PO to the Asset if projects are in play.  If the POs are creating assets directly then a list of POs by Account Assignment "A" will give you exactly what you want.

entry.title: sap system issue analysis by kernel snapshot analyzer tool
entry.content:
Overview

In this blog post, I've detailed the process of utilizing the SAP Kernel Snapshot Analyzer tool through the examination of server snapshots.

DISCLAIMER

The content of this blog post is provided “AS IS”. This information could contain technical inaccuracies, typographical errors, and out-of-date information. This document may be updated or changed without notice at any time. Use of the information is therefore at your own risk. In no event shall SAP be liable for special, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from or related to the use of this document.

Purpose           

This tool can be used for troubleshooting server issue kernel-related issues.

Mainly tool used for dispatcher scheduler information, queue statistics, work process table, session table, work process call stacks, PROC memory consumption, and the root cause analysis for SAP Kernel-related issues.

Prerequisites

SAP NetWeaver Application Server ABAP is a feature available from SAP Kernel 740.

The application server can be configured to automatically or manually generate a dump of critical information when the system encounters abnormal situations, such as handling requests without progress. This dump includes vital details about the server's state and processes at the time of the incident.

SAP Kernel snapshot analysis steps: –

  • Generate snapshot
  • Download snapshot
  • Download kernel analyzer
  • Upload snapshot and generate kernel snapshot analysis report

Generate snapshot:-

SAP system snapshot can automatically be generated when WP unexpectedly finished, hard shutdown, exhausted resources, lack of WP, etc.

Manually generate snapshots via SAP GUI and via OS.

Snapshot generated via SAP GUI

SAP transaction: SM50 -> Administration->Snapshot -> Create

 

 

OS level generates snapshots

Run demon from OS and follow the below command to create the snapshot

m - menu -> p - work-process-adm-table -> e - create snapshot

 

Download snapshot

You can obtain the snapshot file from the SAP system, which is a compressed archive containing ample application server information for analysis. You can utilize the following method to download snapshot files:

SM50 -> Administration->Snapshot -> Administration

Select the snapshot and download it into Dashtop

 

 

You can download the snapshot files directly from the operating system

OS snapshot path:-  /usr/sap/<System ID>/SYS/global/sapcontrol/snapshots/

Download kernel analyzer

The Kernel Snapshot Analyzer is a specialized tool crafted for diagnosing abnormal behaviors within system snapshots. These snapshots can be sourced from the snapshot file or the work directory (developer traces) of the SAP system.

Before proceeding with the analysis, ensure that your system has the Java Runtime Environment (JRE) installed correctly. It's recommended to have at least JRE7 available.

To utilize the Kernel Snapshot Analyzer, follow these steps:

  1. Download the executable file KernelSnapshotAnalyzer.jar.
  2. Also, acquire the introduction slides for guidance.
  3. Once downloaded, run the KernelSnapshotAnalyzer.jar file on your local machine.

By running this tool, you can efficiently diagnose and address any anomalies present within the server snapshots, thereby ensuring optimal performance and stability of your SAP system.

Download the tool from the below link:-

Download kernel snapshot analyzer

 

Upload snapshot and generate kernel snapshot analysis report:-

Run KernelSnapshotAnalyzer.jar and upload the downloaded snapshot into the tool  

Like below:-

 

 

Run analysis report:- it will generate an XML report like below

 

 

C-call stacks for all types of work processes:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Detailed analysis available for all below points

 

 

 

 

 

Reference SAP Notes:-

 2640476 - How to analyze Server Snapshot with kernel snapshot analyzer.

 3110588 - Kernel Snapshot Analyzer: Central KBA

Advantages:-

  •     Helpful for troubleshooting unexpected shutdown
  •     Help for Call stacks related to all snapshot DIA processes
  •     Kernel parameters details and corrections if needed

 

I hope this document will help you with the sap kernel snapshot analyzer tool.

 

Cheers!

Anikesh Jyotishi

entry.title: Re: Order-backlog Report for Customer Projects
entry.content:
If you only need to export data from SAP to Excel, some apps out there do just that (most, if not all, are paid tools). 

However, I do think that since you have all the needed data on SAP, you shouldn't export it but run the process in SAP.

You can use InsightZAP to merge two (or more) reports on SAP. So, if you plan to issue reports based on different transactions and sum them up, you can do so with a few clicks. 

BTW, InsightZAP also allows you to download files from SAP to Excel (and vis-versa). So if it's a must-do for this project, it can also be useful.

entry.title: FieldMetaOverrideConfiguration
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a requirement to assign compliance forms for USA based in a custom field in job info.

This field uses the standard picklist "STATE_USA" but the assignment does not happen. I've followed the instructions in implementation guide and in KBA. No error messages are shown in BPE, it just does not work.

The screenshot of my configuration is attached. Could you please help me on this one? I am stuck for almost three weeks on it.

@Gopinath your assistance would be highly appreciated, please.

Regards,

Lucas

entry.title: Re: Commission Settlement based on Incoming Payment Amounts
entry.content: Very nice inputs Thiago Rigo!

entry.title: Re: Tax destination country and partner for customer tax...
entry.content:
Hello, 

For your first point: sales organization is Canadian, Plant is in USA. So to calculate accurate taxes, we update the tax departure country as CA in sales order billing document tab

If the Sales Orgn is based in Canada and Plant (dispatch location) is in USA, then the Tax Departure Country should be US, or is my understanding incorrect here? 

For your question in second point - when the tax destination country is also updated as CA, the source for customer tax classification changes to sold-to partner

Normally the Destination country is taken from Ship to Country and the Tax Destination Country needed not be updated, except for special cases e.g. EU Triangular Sales (chained Transactions e.g. Poland Customer Ordering from German supplier, who inturn asks his French Supplier to directly dispatch to Poland. In this case the Sales Order in French Supplier will have tax Destination Country as Poland). 

For Sales between entities based in US and Canada, I do not see the need to update the Tax Departure Country. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Tax destination country and partner for customer tax...
entry.content:
Hello

Thank you for your response. 

We basically want to have Canadian sales tax on the order even though plant is US. We dont treat it as export scenario. And so by default departure country is US and we manually update CA in that field to calculate canada taxes.

entry.title: Re: if_rap_query_provider > Filter empty

entry.title: Re: hi experts can u explain me about the free goods in b1
entry.content:
Hi,

Can be this done for Fixed Asset Virtual Items also?

With Regards,

Samudra Gupta

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Alert notification only send ONCE for repeati...
entry.content:
SAP HANA Cloud alerts are can be accessed in multiple ways. 

They are available in SAP HANA Cloud Central, in the alerts app for all instances that are in the subaccount.  

They are also available via a REST API.  SAP HANA Cloud Central uses this API to retrieve and display the alerts.  

I believe that the integration into the SAP Alert Notification Service also works with this REST API.

The SAP HANA cockpit also can show alerts but uses an older method to access the alerts as mentioned in the message shown here.  Because of this, there is a slight difference in the reporting of alerts between the two tools.  I believe this might explain the behavior seen.  In addition,  only alerts for a particular database (not all the alerts from all instances in a subaccount are shown) and non ESS alerts are not shown.

It is also possible to further configure the Alert Notification Service to only send an email when a certain condition occurs such as when the alert is initially created by adding a tags.ans.status condition with a value of Is Equal To Create.  Additional details on the status of alerts can be found at Alerts in SAP HANA Cloud. 

The following tutorial provides some more details on the topic of SAP HANA Cloud Alerts including sending emails using the Alert Notification Service and accessing alerts using a REST API.  Explore SAP HANA Cloud Alerts and Metrics.  

Regards,
Dan van Leeuwen

Mauricio

entry.title: CSRF Token validation SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Dear Sap Community,

We want to call an OData service in our SAP backend via SAP Build Process Automation. However when trying to perform a PATCH request of an action via SAP Build Process Automation
we get the error: "CSRF token validation failed". When the action is performed in test modus the CSRF token validation works as it should. How can we get the data from Process Automation into our backend?

entry.title: BADI after material document post is done
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My requirement is to  access tables - Ser03, OBJK using same material document which has just got posted through MIGO.

I tried BAdi's - MB_DOCUMENT_UPDATE, MB_MIGO_BADI, MB_DOCUMENT_BADI and i got material document number. But the above mentioned tables were not updated till then and so they were blank.

Please suggest me suitable way to access tables just after posting is done.

Thanks.
Shilpi

entry.title: Re: F4 Help for custom fields created using Custom Fields & Logic - InApp Extensibility
entry.content: Is it possible to remove the description from the field value? For example, only show 'G' and not 'Gold customer(G)?

entry.title: Re: IPS Transformation Azure AD (MemberOf) to ABAP
entry.content:
solved , the current syntax is     

 "condition": "$.groups[?(@.displayName contains 'S42_205')] EMPTY false",

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hi there,

Are the free Learning Journeys provided by SAP thorough enough in order to pass the SAP certification exams? Previously dealing with lays-off in my current domain, I would like to upskill and try a professional reorientation.

As a young women, part of a group which is very underrepresented in tech, it would be amazing if I could also benefit from the free certification attempt as part of the digital skills initiative. 

Thank you in advance for your advice and help in this matter,

Mary  

#sapcertification #learningjourney

 
@David_Chaviano

entry.title: Re: 🇺🇸 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud and the RESTful Application Programming Model (Lansing, MI USA)
entry.content: We, SAP, don't set the locations/dates of the CodeJams.  They are requested by the Community and then we do our best to hold as many of those requested as possible. So, a partner or customer from the Philippines would have to request one and offer to host it.

entry.title: Re: Enhancing BW datasources based on ODP_CDS – useful for Datasphere too!
entry.content:
Actually in S/4HANA on premise you can create CDS View from scratch.
So why do we need an extension? ( => only in S/4HANA cloud use case? )

entry.title: HTTP Status Code: 501 (Not Implemented)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing the error "HTTP Error 501. The request transfer encoding type is not supported." in HTTP receiver. Same file when chunked is going through, the file size is not very big just 10kb. But it is not going in one go. Any help will be appreciated, thankyou.

entry.title: Re: Advance Script Slow Performance in SAC for Planning D...
entry.content:
If you don't have huge nr. of data in your editable version (planning area) or huge dimension members/hierarchies/...etc. and the 'preparing to execute' step is still so slow, I'd suggest you to raise an incident for SAP.

There's a general SAP note 3261092  explaining some more, but also a recent SAP note 3432553  saying "The SAC development team is investigating how to improve the preparation step including this issue."

entry.title: Re: Why some values in program are automaticly increment?
entry.content: I don't understand the question, please give real data: which values, which program, what relationship with authorization object? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Seeking Advice: Python Script for Crystal Report 2013...
entry.content:
That particular error message indicates that you have bigger issues than an occasional report not getting scheduled. You should investigate what's causing the SIA to become disconnected.

Since you're running CRS and that doesn't run on a cluster like BOBJ does, I suspect that the issue could be that you're losing the connection to the CMS database. If the CMS database is on another server, this is a network issue. If it's on the same server, this could be RAM or CPU contention issues between CRS and the database.

Since the SIA runs as a service, you don't need the SDK to stop it and start it. Instead, your Python program would interact with the operating system to issue a Net Stop command to the service, wait for the service to completely shut down, and then call Net Start to restart the SIA.

-Dell

entry.title: Re: Does successfactors support test questions with free-...
entry.content:
Hi! I'm bumping this. It's been a few years, and we need to look into what options we have to include "free-text" questions in our exams.

What would be the recommended way as of now?
What are some examples of how other clients have solved this?

For us, now, we use two different systems, which is not optimal. We need to move all exam related questions into SF LMS.

Thanks for any information!

entry.title: Get Started with Embedded SAP Analytics Cloud in SAP Sales & Service Cloud (C4C)
entry.content:
In Addition to the native Business Analytics, SAP offers the option of using SAP Analytics Cloud functionalities as embedded version in C4C - "Embedded SAP Analytics Cloud".

This is part of the overall SAP Strategy to have a single analytics and reporting engine across all solutions and lines of business. Embedded SAC helps you to analyze data in real time and on the fly the same Data Sources as in the native Business Analytics are used.
Enhanced reporting capabilities and new ways of visualizing data by e.g. color coding and chart options enable Customers to offer a next level reporting experience to their users.
 

How it works:

The embedded Analytics functionalities are accessible within C4C and access the standard C4C Data Sources which are also the basis for the C4C Business Analytics.

With Introducing two new Workcenter Views "Design Stories" within Business Analytics Workcenter for Administrators and "Stories" within Analysis Workcenter for end-users you have the possibility to create different role and page based page Story Sheets. Elements like Headers, Texts, charts, graphs, tables, and more let you setup reports and dashboards that tell "your story".
A story is a presentation-style document that uses charts, visualizations, text, images, and pictograms to describe data. Once you create or open a story, you can add and edit pages, sections, and elements as you like.

How to build an SAC Report & Visualization

In the following section you will find a step-by-step instruction to build your own embedded SAC Story - from scoping the embedded SAC functions until the analytical visualization.

Use Case: Opportunity Forecasting vs. Actuals Comparison

When using opportunity forecasting in C4C the opportunity forecast is compared with the values of won/lost opportunities. Some customers face challenges here as they want to compare the opportunity forecast with the actual order income, because real life shows that won opportunities sometimes do not reflect the actual order income. Even though the won opportunity value was e.g. at 150.000 USD the actual Order Value resulting from it was only 120.000 USD due to short notice changes.

By being able to easily bring multiple dimensions and measures from different data sources together in one visualization, users are now able to combine forecasted values from opportunity data sources with the real order volume without needing to build data source joins like in the native Business Analytics. Attributes from multiple Data Sources can be used in one Story.

The Screenshot below shows the forecasted opportunity volume (blue line) versus the actual order entry (yellow column) per calendar month for the current year. Below the same values are shown in table format.

 

Steps to get started

First of all an Incident to SAP Support needs to be created to get the SAC Functions provisioned. Find further information here: help.sap.com
To be able to access embedded SAC in C4C, you have to have SSO enabled within C4C and need to access the C4C Tenant via the SSO-URL. Example: my123456-sso.crm.ondemand.com

Scope SAC in Business Configuration

In scoping questions (Step 4) go to Built-in Services and Support -> System Management -> Analytics. Select the Checkbox "Do you want to use embedded SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) features in SAP Cloud for Customer?"

 

Configure single sign-on for SAP Analytics Cloud

In Order to get Embedded Analytics running, you need to have single sign on with an identity provider in place and need to connect Embedded SAC to your identity provider.
Navigate to Business Analytics Workcenter, Common Tasks Workcenter View and open "Single Sign-On for SAC" to download the Metadata XML-File from C4C. You need to upload the file into your identity provider.

If SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS) is in use, please refer to this guide on help.sap.com for setting up the identity provider.


After the necessary steps in your IdP you need to upload the IdP Metadata in SAP Cloud for Customer again via the Upload button. Make sure you select the right IdP Subject Name Identifier. It can be User ID or User e-mail.

 

*IMPORTANT NOTE: Several Customers could not get the embedded Started due to errors which were related to the IDP setup:
User IDs in C4C are always maintained in Uppercase letters automatically whereas on SAP IAS (the IdP system provided by SAP) are case sensitive.
Please refer to the following KBA for further information: https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3279276

 

Assign "Design Stories" and "Stories" Workcenter Views to your Business Roles

For administrators / story designers:

within the respective business role you can now select a new Workcenter View "Design Stories" within "Business Analytics" Workcenter.

 

For end-users:

within the respective business role you can now select a new Workcenter View "Stories" within "Analysis" Workcenter.

 

Design your first Story

Navigate to Business Analytics, Design Stories and create a new story by clicking on "New".
Under Available Data, select a datasource and drag and drop it to add it to the Query Designer. Use the Search Field to search for specific objects like "Opportunity".

 



Click the table icon to select columns/fields from the data source that you want to include in the model.  The use case above the attributes "Expected Value" and Month/Calendar year are selected.

Click Preview Query to view the structure. Click Finish. In the popup window, enter a name for your new SAC model.
the story designer gets opened where you can add charts, tables, and so on. You can add more data sources and link them via dimensions. So Far there is only an empty page, in a few steps we will start to fill it with information.

Add another Data Source by clicking on "Add or Edit Data Sources" within "Data" Tab.


Search for "Sales Order Header" Data Source and select the attributes "Net Amount" and "Year Month"

 

Link Dimensions by clicking on the Dimensions "Link Dimensions" within "Data" Tab


Select an available attribute which is available for linking. In this case we can link it via the Month/Calendar Year - Year Month dimension.

 

Now the data model is ready, we have all the necessary data collected which we need for the opportunity vs. order income comparison.

In the next steps we will bring the data into a visualization. In the tab "insert" click on "Chart" to create a new Chart. As a Chart Structure select Comparison and then Combination Column & Line.

Click on Add Linked Models to add Opportunity Header as Data Source.

Linkage of the two data models:


Maintain your Measures and Dimensions from the previously selected Data Models.

 

Maintain Settings like "Y Axes Overlap" and Color Coding. You can also Rename the selected Dimensions and Measures to your needs. by clicking on the thre bubbles next to the dimension or measure and then rename.

 


Don't forget to save your work by clicking on the save button located on the menu bar on the top.

To add the table-view like on the screenshot above click on "table" within the "Insert tab" and repeat the steps like for the line and column visualization.

Assign the story to a business role

within the "Design Stories" Workcenter View overview you now need to assign the story to a business role.

Access the story from a end-user perspective

To access the designed story now from a user perspective, the user needs to navigate to “Analysis” Workcenter and “Stories” Workcenter View.

 

 

Another Inspiration for a Dashboard – Example: Lead Management Overview

KPI's on the one, customizable visualizations with color coding the other side will give you intelligence about your Sales Organization. On thy fly filters placed on the top and structure criteria in form of radio buttons build a comprehensive control to get the right data together.

 

Current Limitations of Embedded Analytics (SAC) in C4C


At the moment there are limitations when working with embedded analytics in C4C. the full and up to date list of limitations can to be found at help.sap.com

Important to know limitations are: 

  • You can build stories only on standard and cloud data sources for SAP Cloud for Customer. You can’t create them using joined, combined, or virtual data sources. Also, you can't create stories from data sources from any other SAP products apart from SAP Cloud for Customer. 

Comment: as Multiple Data Sources can be used in one Story and even in one visualization as in the Example above (combining Data from Sales Oder Data Source and Opportunity Data Source in one Graph) you can get the same result as in the native Business Analytics with joined Data Sources. Extension Fields can be included into the standard Data Source of the respective Business Object.

  • The embedded stories aren’t available in the mobile application.
  • Embedded Analytics stories cannot be used on the C4C home page and other Ui's (like embedded reports on e.g. Account UI)

 

Summary & Further Links

Embedded SAP Analytics Cloud features can bring great value and insights into your SAP Cloud for Customer Data.
Further Information around this topic can be found on help.sap.com.

I would like to recommend another great blog here about Embedded SAC in SAP Sales & Service Cloud V2. It describes the step by step setup of ticket/case analytical content. the embedded SAC functions are basically the same for SAP Sales & Service Cloud V1 and V2. So this one is also be very helpful to gain knowledge on embedded SAC: Link

In November 2023 my colleague Vinita Sinha and I gave a webinar about getting started with embedded SAC, the recording can be found via this Link.

entry.title: SAC BW Live data model: Expand node or Level in compact display mode
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

Is there a way to unfold a node or drill it to a level via scripting in a story table if I have the compact display mode activated. I can only use that kind of scripting for a real hierarchy on one dimension. 

Kind regards
Julian

entry.title: Re: Compression of String in S/4HANA
entry.content: I use EXPORT ... TO DATA BUFFER ... COMPRESSION ON

entry.title: Re: Deprecated features in Latest Goal Management
entry.content:
Hi @Sam_Passman ,

Thanks for the clarification, it's really helpful. Just a couple more follow up questions if I may:

In your point 3 above, I understand that after the universal push, our legacy goal plans will become read-only. I believe we have the option to convert our legacy (live) goal plans to the new version after the push. Am I correct in saying that if we do this conversion will they become editable again, but the Tasks fields will be invisible, so will have to be replaced with Milestones before the push?

Unfortunately there is never a good time for us to migrate, as staff could still be adding or editing 2024 goals into December or even early next year, and the 2025 PM forms (and associated goal plans) will start to be launched for new starters from this August onward.

Given our situation, do you have a recommendation on how to proceed so as not to trouble our users? I wonder if many other customers are facing similar challenges with this push?

Thanks in advance,

Julia

entry.title: Re: Duplicate EDI - Sales Order
entry.content:
Unfortunately, it seems like not, I tried a quick test and got this error

I will do a few more tests.

Are you trying to generate it for testing purposes or just to have EDI go to a different receiver?

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: What is the first item in the left hand-side navigati...
entry.content: Answer: Subaccounts

entry.title: Re: Long text at inspection completion.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Could you please help me for the same problem.

Before saving the UD, the system shows me the long text in word format and I fill that and after closing that, again show me the long text in another format, I also fill that again but I cannot see my last comments. I do not understand why there are two different long texts and how to deactivate one of them.

If I deactivate the "Documentation required" in the material master, the long text is completely deactivated, but I still need one.

 

 

 

Best Regards

Karthika

entry.title: Re: AI Core SDK Create an Artifact
entry.content: Hi, I tried AI Core Client and AI Client, and also AI Client with tht path. The error was from my workflow having an error. I found the error when I checked the status of one of the components, maybe application. In the status json it mentioned that workflow failed, which means the scenario didn't get created. I marked your reply correct, because if that was my issue it would be correct. Thanks.

entry.title: Quote table in SAP CPQ
entry.content:
Hello Guys, I have two quote table from which I have to get information and I have to add that in a template.

I'll provide a example so that it will be easy for understanding.

Suppose there are two quote tables called "A" and "B". And there is one table in template generation called "C". Now I want first two columns from A quote table in the C table in template(same columns in template as well) and third column value from B quote table into the third column of table of C which is present in template. Can you please provide a generic Q tag for this.

Thanks 🙂

Dear Community,

how can i include Additional Component Text from the Bill of Material in Purchase Requisitions/Order? (Table: STPO Field Name: POTX). Please see screenshot below:

 

Best Regards

Emir

entry.title: Re: Error: Cannot create service instance, there isno database available in Business Application Stu
entry.content: Hey Tom

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content: @H_Wuehr , That is correct! Only Skills, that exist in the 'Attributes Library' of the customer instance, will be recommended to the employee in their GP. If a skill is not present in the Library, it will not show up as a recommendation for employees in GP.

entry.title: Is it possible to confirm a WT Posting Change for Production in the RF environment?
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We do material staging for production via the dedicated app "Stage material for production". This creates a WT (Postin Changes) from a source bin to the final destination bin. Is there any way to confirm these tasks via RF? I do not see this functionality in RF menu

We handle serial numbers so it is very annoying to confirm WT via the desktop app; doing this via RF will save us a lot of time.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to confirm a WT Posting Change for Pro...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Please try to confirm the WT by the RF option by the path: 02 Manual Selection -> 02 Selection by WO. (Use the WO that it's related to the posting change)

In general, if a WT has a valid queue to the resource being used and so on it should be possible to be confirmed in RF (e.g. using manual selection by WO).

In case this doesn't work or it's not what you expect please provide further information by this topic here 🙂

Hope this already helps!

 

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Re: Finding the right CDS Extractor in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi sapbwbi_07,

the concept for extending CDS Views is called "extension View".
Here is a blog which might help explaining this concept.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-extend-abap-cds-view-entity-core-data-services/ba-p/13534334

If I_UTILITIESINVOICINGDOCUMENT is not extraction enabled, then this is maybe on purpose. Consider this. But of course it is worth a test with a customer cds view which reads from this cds views and which is extraction enabled. This would be a FULL load.

KR Frank

entry.title: Re: Local Storage Database problems when Migrating from old SAP Appgyver
entry.content: Hi Josh. It seems that with the migration, the old type resources won't convert automatically, so the safest bet would be to recreate the resources as on-device storage types. Please let us know if this resolves the issue.

entry.title: Custom Field connection through multiple Business Context
entry.content:
Hi, 

Is it possible to connect two different Custom Fields with different Business Contexts? 

We have created two custom fields containing a UN number, one for Master Data: Product General and one for Sales: Sales Document Item. They have the type of "Association to Business Object" and are connected to our Custom Business Object where we maintain UN number data. 

 


Now my question is:
Is it possible to connect these two custom fields so that if a product is given a UN number in the "Manage Product Master Data" app (first custom field) - that it will be automatically filled in the "Custom Fields" section of a sales order if the product entered has data in the custom field?  

Product Master Data custom field:

Sales Order custom field:



We are operating on a SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

entry.title: SAP MDG-S integration with 3rd party onboarding system
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We are planning to add SAP MDG classic mode separate new instance in addition to SAP S4HANA on prem( replacement from ECC and SRM) new instance along with Ariba Catalog & Business Network ( currently linked to SAP SRM)

Now, we have a 3rd party supplier onboarding system ( non-SAP system). What are the different ways of integrating 3rd party applications to SAP MDG for suppliers and material?

Regards

Gaurav

entry.title: Default Notification Processing Context in Fiori App 'Create Maintenance Request' (F5111A)
entry.content:
Question: Is there a solution to make the field 'Notification Processing Context' default?

Why: As this is an important field in the new Reactive Maintenance Flow, which triggers a separate Maintenance process (Minor or Emergency Work), it would be ideal to default this field.

Reason: Users forget to fill in this field. 

Idea: Idea is to make for example 3Fiori apps in where the Notification Processing Context is defaulted. In the description of the Fiori app Minor, Emergency & Standard Maintenance Request can be indicated & via authorisations it is now already possible to limit this.

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management Error : Unable to identify proxy for host
entry.content:
I take 2 learnings from this, one good and another not so good.

1. It is not me, who made a mistake.

2. Our success depends on pure luck. I wasn't lucky today, un/re/deploy did not help me. Maybe I am more lucky tomorrow.

Sad.

EDIT: and one more learning: I should have stayed with ABAP. This product is far from being complete.

entry.title: Re: BAS can't deploy to ABAP Repository after Web IDE migration
entry.content: Thanks for answering your own post, it helped me with the same problem. The hint with the "Environment Check" was also new to me and might be great for debugging future problems.

entry.title: Re: No authorization to log via a trusted system (L-RC=10...
entry.content:
Just who want to know what's the answer.
You have to enter a client number in the RFC-Connection 😉

entry.title: SAPUI5 Custom data in analytical column
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a SmartTable of type AnalyticalTable and custom data in an AnalyticalColumn. The column contains data which should be summed up and the total should be displayed. This is working fine. Each cell in the column, should have a link, so when the user presses the cell, a popover is opened. This is also working. Howevere, there are two issues:

1. the unit of measure is missing, now when I have added the column to the custom data 

2. The sum value should not have a link behind it, but since the whole column has links, also the sum value has it.

Here is my code:

            <table:AnalyticalTable id="customTable">
                    <table:columns>
                        <table:AnalyticalColumn summed="true" id="TotalStock" autoResizable="true" resizable="true" 
                                                leadingProperty="Requirements_Stock" width="100px">
                            <table:customData>
                            <core:CustomData key="p13nData" value='\{"columnKey": "Requirements_Stock", 
                                  "leadingProperty": "Requirements_Stock", "columnIndex": "17", "unit":"TO"}'/>
                            </table:customData>
                            <Label text="{i18n>Requirements_Stock}"></Label>
                            <table:template>
                                <Link id="link" text="{Requirements_Stock}" press="onOpenPOMatMat"/>
                            </table:template>
                        </table:AnalyticalColumn>
                    </table:columns>

            </table:AnalyticalTable>
        </smartTable:SmartTable>s

  And this is the output:

Can anyone help with the issues?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: [Error] Ledger Z2 defined in CoCd JB01 is not active...
entry.content:
Hi,

You need to create a depreciation area per ledger group you created in the company code assigned to chart of depreciation in question.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business AI : Infuse AI in applications using SAP BTP (with some Use Cases)

Is SAP AI core a prerequisite to creating applications infusing gen AI? 

Can we build Gen AI-based apps on BTP without leveraging the SAP AI core?

Our SAC releases is 2024.02.

How could this problem be solved?

Regards.

entry.title: Re: How to build Custom Variable Pay Combined Statement in SAP SuccessFactors !
entry.content:
Hi @swagatikapanda 

I don't build custom statements I leave that to reporting experts, I will try to get one to give their 2 cents on your issue.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Even though gt_output2 is empty, the previous data is displayed.
entry.content: It can be one, two or more, it's not the problem. Probably you are instantiating ONE OF THEM more than once without emptying the container: several INSTANTIATIONS in the same container => only the first one is shown.

entry.title: Re: Visualize Your Assets in 3D with SAP Asset Performance Management and Product Lifecycle Manageme
entry.content:
I'd like to share a couple of links (to a demo video and how-to slides for this integration) from my PLM product team colleague, Nick Wang:

  • Demo: Staycurrent_2402__Embed_Visualization_into_SAP_APM
  • Presentation: Embedding_Visualization_into_SAP_APM

entry.title: Re: Preview on your device
entry.content: Thanks. I did all the alternatives but I couldn't. My account is free. I stay in Brazil, my region. I tested all alternatives EU10, US10, Community, AppGyver Classic, Custom, login with URL on Android and iPhone. unsuccessfully.
